# Lagoon Studio

> Lagoon Studio is a native macOS application that automatically detects motion in video files. It analyzes pixel changes between frames to identify interesting moments, visualizes activity on a timeline, and exports clips. All processing runs locally on Apple Silicon with hardware acceleration. No internet connection or cloud upload required.

## Key Facts
- Platform: macOS 14+ (Apple Silicon required)
- Pricing: Free 7-day trial, then $8.99/mo, $75/yr, or $59 lifetime
- Supported formats: H.264, HEVC, AV1, and most common video formats
- Privacy: 100% local processing, no data leaves the device
- Developer: Tomare LLC

## Links
- Homepage: https://lagoon.video
- Download: https://github.com/TheNorthEestern/lagoon-releases/releases/latest/download/Lagoon-Studio.dmg
- Changelog: https://lagoon.video/changelog
- Privacy Policy: https://lagoon.video/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://lagoon.video/terms
